__otg.label: Production Qwen 2511 Storyboard
__otg.description: Qwen Image Edit 2511 storyboard workflow. Node 30 receives one Next Scene line per submitted storyboard image. Up to five character reference images can be enabled per request.

inputs.prompt:
Next Scene 1: The camera holds a steady, atmospheric medium shot (35mm) centered on the same wooden kitchen table at night; the young woman from Reference Image 2 sits upright on the tabletop, hands folded neatly, bathed in warm amber candlelight; the kitchen stays silent, background softly blurred, calm but mysterious. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly (same face, silver braids, outfit, age); natural skin texture. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 2: The camera makes a very slow push-in toward her face without changing the room layout; her eyes shift from the dark corners to the flickering candle, then down to the white pizza plate; her posture tightens almost imperceptibly. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; keep braids/outfit consistent. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 3: The camera tilts down from her face to the tabletop; candle wax drips in slow detail, a faint draft ripples the flame, and shadows tremble across the wood; the pizza plate slides a millimeter as if nudged by air, stopping dead. Identity/Face lock: same woman; hands/skin tone consistent; realistic anatomy. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 4: The camera tilts back up to a tight close-up on her face; she lowers her chin, pupils sharpening on the unseen disturbance; the candlelight edges her cheekbones, emphasizing the hush. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; same eye color; no redesign. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 5: The camera eases back just enough to include her torso while keeping the same table framing; she reaches for the pizza with deliberate precision and lifts a slice with restrained, “student-like” elegance; the gesture stays small, formal, controlled. Identity/Face lock: same woman; braids/clothing unchanged. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 6: The camera holds shallow focus on her face as she takes a small bite; she freezes mid-chew, eyes widening slightly as if tasting something off or catching a tiny sound; the candle flicker feels momentarily stronger, reflected in her eyes. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; natural skin texture. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 7: The camera follows her hand in a compact movement as she pulls the slice away; a cheese strand stretches and snaps; she cough-laughs once, then regains composure, fanning her fingers subtly to cool them—still seated on the tabletop. Identity/Face lock: same woman; realistic hands; lighting unchanged. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 8: The camera tilts down to the plate as she sets the slice back; her fingertips hover, then she nudges a napkin aside on the same table surface, revealing a small folded note that had been tucked under the edge. Identity/Face lock: same woman; realistic anatomy. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 9: The camera locks into a close-up on her hands unfolding the note on the tabletop; cryptic symbols and a tiny key icon appear in ink; candlelight stays warm and intimate, highlighting paper fibers and skin texture. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; hands/skin tone consistent. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 10: The camera pans only a few inches laterally to keep her centered as she slides off the tabletop with controlled grace; her feet land softly on the kitchen floor right beside the same table, and she turns her gaze toward the nearby countertop area—no change in room setup. Identity/Face lock: same woman; outfit unchanged. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 11: The camera tracks a short step or two within the same frame as she reaches the nearest cabinet above the counter; she opens it and rummages among jars with minimal movement; the candlelit table remains in the background blur, unchanged. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 12: The camera pushes in to her hand at the counter; she gently shakes one glass jar, and a tiny metal key taps the glass, then drops into her palm with a crisp clink; her attention locks onto it, linking it to the note. Identity/Face lock: same woman; key small and realistic. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 13: The camera performs a quick but short whip/pan as she pivots back toward the table—still inside the same kitchen; her silver braids sweep her shoulder with a hint of motion blur; urgency rises without changing location. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; lighting warm and consistent. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 14: The camera stabilizes at the table edge as she crouches slightly and inserts the tiny key into a concealed latch built into the table’s underside/side panel; click—the small hidden compartment releases. Identity/Face lock: same woman; realistic hands; same table and candle visible. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 15: The camera peeks close over her shoulder into the table compartment; she retrieves a small box wrapped in dark cloth; the candle behind her throws long, soft shadows across the wood grain, keeping everything anchored to the same table. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 16: The camera tracks up to her face as she straightens beside the table holding the box; her expression shifts into triumphant curiosity; she returns to her seated position atop the tabletop in one smooth, compact motion. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; same eye color; no redesign. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 17: The camera returns to the original medium table shot; she places the box next to the candle and unwraps it, revealing an antique metal compass; the flame bends toward it, as if drawn by a subtle force. Identity/Face lock: same woman; same kitchen table setting; scene unchanged. realistic cinematic style
Next Scene 18: The camera slowly pulls back just a touch—still the same kitchen, same table, same layout; the compass clicks open and projects a soft, luminous map hovering above the wood; she looks up with a quiet, victorious smile as candlelight and magic glow mingle without altering the room. Identity/Face lock: match Reference Image 2 exactly; consistent hair and skin. realistic cinematic style

inputs.instruction: Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.
